title.en: Virdis BioOps introduces audit-ready quality rooms
title.zh: Virdis BioOps 发布审计就绪质量空间

summary.en: New controls help biotech teams preserve reviewer decisions, evidence lineage, and partner-ready exports.
summary.zh: 新控制能力帮助生物技术团队保留审阅决策、证据血缘与合作方就绪导出。

title.en: Why CMC readiness now belongs in weekly leadership review
title.zh: 为什么 CMC 就绪度应进入每周管理层评审

summary.en: Program teams can reduce launch risk when quality signals and manufacturing dependencies are reviewed together.
summary.zh: 当质量信号与生产依赖被同步审阅时，项目团队可降低上市风险。

title.en: Virdis expands bilingual deployment support for Asia-Pacific biotech teams
title.zh: Virdis 扩展亚太生物技术团队双语部署支持

summary.en: The rollout adds bilingual templates for board updates, partner governance, and regulatory evidence reviews.
summary.zh: 此次升级新增董事会更新、合作方治理与注册证据审阅的双语模板。

title.en: Emerging therapeutics teams standardize partner governance with Virdis
title.zh: 新兴疗法团队使用 Virdis 标准化合作方治理

summary.en: Shared scorecards bring CRO, CDMO, and internal milestone commitments into one leadership rhythm.
summary.zh: 共享评分卡将 CRO、CDMO 与内部里程碑承诺纳入统一管理节奏。

title.en: A practical readiness map for IND-enabling program reviews
title.zh: 面向 IND 支撑项目评审的实用就绪度地图

summary.en: The guide outlines how to connect evidence, risks, decisions, and owners before formal submission work begins.
summary.zh: 本指南说明如何在正式申报工作开始前连接证据、风险、决策与责任人。
